SynoQueue
Get Started
Real-time Queue Management for Streamers

Play With Your
Viewers Without Chaos

SynoQueue automatically manages your mabar queue using Sociabuzz donation triggers. Viewers donate, system queues them — you just play.

Start StreamingView Live Queue

Realtime

Firestore onSnapshot

Auto Queue

Donation triggered

OBS Ready

Browser source overlay

Everything for mabar sessions

Built specifically for Mobile Legends streamers who run daily mabar with viewers.

⚡

Auto Donation Queue

Viewers donate via Sociabuzz and are automatically added to the game queue. No manual work.

🔴

Realtime Updates

Firestore onSnapshot keeps the queue live across all viewers, dashboard, and overlay simultaneously.

🖥

OBS Overlay

Transparent browser source overlay with glow styling. Shows current player and queue live.

🎮

Streamer Dashboard

Full control panel — finish games, skip players, add manually, and view donation history.

How It Works

From donation to playing in under 5 seconds.

01

Viewer Donates

Viewer donates on Sociabuzz and puts their IGN in the donation message.

02

Joins Queue

Webhook triggers automatically — IGN is extracted and games are calculated from the amount.

03

Streamer Plays

Streamer sees the queue on dashboard and plays with the current player.

04

Queue Advances

Hit Finish Game — gamesLeft decrements and when it hits 0 the next player auto-promotes.

Donation Tiers

Amount is automatically converted to games when viewer donates.

RM4

1 game

RM10

3 games

RM20

6 games

RM30

10 games

Ready to run your first mabar?

Set up in minutes. Manage your entire viewer queue hands-free.
